steps.name: download_md17
steps.acceptance: Raw MD17 data for all 8 molecules downloaded and accessible

steps.name: preprocess_canonical_frame
steps.acceptance: All 8 molecules preprocessed into canonical frame: CoM-centered, principal-axis-aligned, padded to max atom count with attention mask

steps.name: compute_reference_stats
steps.acceptance: ref_stats.pt exists for each molecule dataset with energy stats, pairwise distance distributions, bond length distributions

steps.name: create_metadata
steps.acceptance: metadata.json exists for each dataset directory with full schema per CLAUDE.md

steps.name: train_test_split
steps.acceptance: 80/10/10 train/val/test split per molecule, saved in dataset files

steps.name: verification_and_visualization
steps.acceptance: Verification plots (energy distributions, pairwise distances, sample conformations) saved to results/

steps.name: source_integration
steps.acceptance: No .py files in experiment dir; data pipeline code in src/
